[Omegaverse | Modern Day Earth]

____________________________________________

After coming home from a tiring day from school, you decide to read a novel you've purchased about the Omegaverse. Now, you've been isekai'd to that world! What adventures will you take? This is an endless, open-ended RPG where your actions determine your pathways, enjoy!
